customer.name: 馬場 祐次
customer.address: 〒106-0031 港区西麻布 1-10-7 FT2 2F 焼肉古今 様方

root_cause.summary: scripts/recover_kokon_sample_order.py hardcoded '_logo_v2.png' (KOKON wordmark only, no Honoo mascot) instead of the correct '_logo_v3b.png' / '_logo_v3b_blackbg.png' Honoo versions when manually recovering the order after Stripe `shipping_details` empty bug caused webhook → Printful submission failure.
root_cause.preceding_bug: Stripe Checkout shipping_details was empty due to ?expand[]=shipping_details quirk → collab_orders stuck at status='sample_received' without Printful submission

shipments.note: could not cancel — printful API returned `Order is no longer editable`. Wrong-design Snapback may still ship later.

customer_complaint.summary: Baba pointed out the design printed differs from what was advertised when he purchased.

actions: Visually verified design mismatch by comparing _logo_v2.png (wrong) vs _logo_v3b.png (correct, used in Yuki's own same-day order #158863837)
Generated Printful Mockup Generator previews of correct design on Tee / Apron / Snapback for visual confirmation
Submitted new Printful order with v3b design across all 5 SKUs, paid by Yuki (no charge to Baba)
Attempted to cancel onhold Snapback in original order — failed (`OR-1 Order is no longer editable`); customer notified in apology email
Sent apology email from yuki@hamada.tokyo to harley1801cc@yahoo.co.jp

apology_email.subject: 馬場様 — MU × KOKON サンプル品 再発送のお詫びとご案内

remediation.wrong_items_disposition: customer instructed they may keep, regift, or discard — no return required

preventive_action_required.task: Eliminate hardcoded design URLs in scripts/recover_*.py and fulfillment helpers
preventive_action_required.fix: Read print URL from catalog_products.print_url or proposal_skus.design_url at runtime; never hardcode `_logo_v*.png` in recovery scripts.
preventive_action_required.secondary: Fix Stripe Checkout `shipping_details` empty bug (root cause of needing the recover script in the first place) — webhook handler should not request `?expand[]=shipping_details` when Stripe's default already includes it.
preventive_action_required.tertiary: Order audit cron: when fulfill_catalog_order writes a Printful order, also write the design URL into catalog_orders.design_url and surface it on /admin/catalog/orders so design mismatches are catchable before shipment.
